skills.name: fal-kling-o3
skills.description: Generate images and videos with Kling O3 — Kling's most powerful model family — via fal.ai.

skills.name: fal-lip-sync
skills.description: Create talking head videos and lip sync audio to video via fal.ai. Useful for explainer avatars, multilingual dubbing previews, and social cuts.

skills.name: fal-video-edit
skills.description: Edit existing videos using AI — remix style, upscale, remove background, and add audio via fal.ai's hosted video models.

skills.name: frame-data-chart-nyt
skills.description: NYT-newsroom typography, staggered reveal animation, and editorial-grade charts (line, bar, or range band).

skills.name: frame-flowchart-sticky
skills.description: SVG curve connectors, sticky-note nodes, and cursor interaction with a whiteboard-brainstorm feel.

skills.name: frame-glitch-title
skills.description: Digital glitch, chromatic offset, and data-corruption title frame for video transitions or cyberpunk heroes.

skills.name: frame-light-leak-cinema
skills.description: Film light leaks, grain, 16:9 letterbox, and large serif type for cinematic openings or chapter cards.

skills.name: frame-liquid-bg-hero
skills.description: WebGL-style fluid displacement background with a quote overlay, suited to video intros, landing heroes, or posters.

skills.name: frame-logo-outro
skills.description: Segmented logo assembly, glow bloom, and tagline reveal for video outros or brand closing frames.

skills.name: frame-macos-notification
skills.description: Realistic macOS notification banner with app icon, title, and body, suited to video overlays or product teasers.

skills.name: remotion
skills.description: Programmatic video creation with React. Useful for branded explainers, social cuts, dashboards-to-video, and reproducible motion graphics.

skills.name: sora
skills.description: Generate, remix, and manage short video clips via OpenAI's Sora API. Useful for cinematic shots, b-roll, and rapid concept video iteration.

skills.name: venice-video
skills.description: Video generation and transcription workflows via the Venice.ai API.

skills.name: vfx-text-cursor
skills.description: Cursor light trail, chromatic rays, and directional flares for word-by-word quote reveals in video intros.

skills.name: video-downloader
skills.description: Download videos from YouTube and other platforms for offline viewing, editing, or archival with support for various formats and quality options.

skills.name: video-hyperframes
skills.description: Hyperframes / Remotion-compatible continuous frame animation with autoplay support.

skills.name: youtube-clipper
skills.description: YouTube clip generation and editing with automated workflows — pull source video, slice highlights, add captions, and export.
